subject: Re: Removing bad tilts
body:
Hey Hamid,
Tilt deselection is not handled particularly elegantly in WarpTools (no GUI to make it easy) - the GUI is incoming but no firm timeline to share yet, until then: script!
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Oct 6, 2025, at 11:16, Hamidreza Rahmani <hamid13r@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿
Hi all,
I have a dataset that I aligned in etomo and to get a better model/remove junks I removed some tiles in the fine alignment step (using 1,28-36 so there are a bunch of bad tilts). 
When I use ts_import_alignment I see all the views are imported into the xml files and the use tilt section is True for all of them. 
Is there an easy way to fix this? 
Do you recommend I write a code to look at taSolution.log and edit the xml files to change those views to False in use Tilt section?
Best,
Hamid
